purpose: Data-only fixtures for the first exact Clean Fast Break entry, exit, stop, cost, failure, sample-size, and promotion values. These fixtures prepare regression/backtest-prep logic only; they do not backtest, calculate P&L, prove profitability, choose a real trade, or mark readiness.

rule_summary.entry: Long calls only. Entry is allowed only when setup, option context, and execution context pass. Later backtest-prep entry basis is the setup-safe accepted quote ask plus a 0.02 per-contract slippage buffer.
rule_summary.exit: First-pass testing exits at the earliest accepted event among profit target, option premium stop, setup invalidation stop, or signal-day time exit.
rule_summary.profit_target: Profit target triggers at +25% option premium from the slippage-adjusted entry basis.
rule_summary.option_premium_stop: Hard option premium stop triggers at -15% from the slippage-adjusted entry basis.
rule_summary.setup_invalidation_stop: Underlying setup invalidation remains active after entry; a later harness must exit the selected option on the first setup-safe invalidation event using bid minus slippage.
rule_summary.time_exit: Exit no later than 15:45 ET on the signal day.
rule_summary.cost_slippage: Entry uses ask plus 0.02. Exit uses bid minus 0.02. Zero-cost fills are forbidden.
rule_summary.failure_diagnosis: Specific named reason required for every known blocker.
rule_summary.sample_size_gate: First backtest-prep batch can run on the current candidates, but no promotion can occur from fewer than 20 valid completed CFB examples.
rule_summary.promotion_gate: Promotion requires accepted rules, passing replay/regression, at least 20 valid completed CFB examples, and positive expectancy review after costs.

fixtures.reason: SPY CFB 002 has the accepted starter selected contract, setup-time-safe quote, ask entry basis, clean option context, and clean execution context. It is ready for later harness implementation, not for counted P&L in this task.
Post-signal option quote is future option data and no fallback contract is allowed.
The selected quote is older than five minutes at setup.
First-pass profit target triggers when bid-minus-slippage reaches at least 25% above ask-plus-entry-slippage.
First-pass hard option stop triggers when bid-minus-slippage falls to 15% below ask-plus-entry-slippage.
Underlying invalidation remains active after entry and exits the selected option at bid minus the accepted slippage buffer.
A still-open first-pass CFB option position exits no later than 15:45 ET on the signal day.
Long-call entry uses the accepted setup-safe ask plus the 0.02 first-pass slippage buffer.
Long-call exit uses the selected option bid less the 0.02 first-pass slippage buffer.
First-pass testing must not create synthetic zero-cost option fills.
Known no-trade and blocked cases must not be hidden behind generic skipped or unknown labels.
The current candidates can be used for the first backtest-prep batch, but promotion cannot occur with fewer than 20 valid completed CFB examples.
Promotion requires accepted rules, passing replay/regression, enough valid examples, and positive expectancy review after costs. This fixture does not calculate expectancy.

explicit_non_goals: No checker code is created by this fixture file.
No evidence package row is filled by this fixture file.
No raw Databento files are modified.

No backtest, trade selection, exit simulation, cost model execution, slippage model execution, P&L, proof, profitability, readiness, live, broker, order, account, main.py, or Railway behavior is authorized by this fixture file.
